zh.lifeSummary: Katharine de Hastang是John de Hastang的女兒，於1305年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布。她於大約1327年與Ralph Stafford 1st Earl結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1336年7月6日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾卡素 邱奇享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastang
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Haston
meanings: English: habitational name from Haston in Shropshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hēafod ‘head’ + stān ‘stone’.
English: from the Norman personal name Hasten; see Hasting .
Scottish: habitational name from Hestan in Rerrick (Kirkcudbrightshire).

variants.name: Hastings
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

nameMeanings.name: Katharine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Katherine , associated by folk etymology with Greek katharos ‘pure’. This is the preferred spelling in Germany. It is also the one used in the name of the American film star Katharine Hepburn ( 1907–2003 ).

en.lifeSummary: Katharine de Hastang was born in 1305, in Chebsey, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of John de Hastang. She married Ralph Stafford 1st Earl about 1327. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 6 July 1336, in Castle Church, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Katharine de Hastang est née en 1305, à Chebsey, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de John de Hastang. Elle a épousé Ralph Stafford 1st Earl environ 1327. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 juillet 1336, à Castle Church, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Katharine de Hastangは1305年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチェブセイでJohn de Hastangの娘として生まれた。約1327年にRalph Stafford 1st Earlと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1336年7月6日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアカストル チャーチで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katharine de Hastang(은)는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 체브시에서 John de Hastang의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1327년 Ralph Stafford 1st Earl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1336년 7월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 카스틀 c후르치에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Katharine de Hastang родилась в 1305 г. в местности шебси, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали John de Hastang. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Stafford 1st Earl около 1327 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 июля 1336 г. в местности кастл чурч, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
